title: Datadog stock soars 31% on blockbuster earnings as AI winners emerge in software
text: Datadog Stock Soars as AI Drives Software Outperformance. Market Context: Datadog reported strong financial results that exceeded Wall Street expectations and sparked a broader rally in software stocks. Financial Highlights: Revenue of 1 billion a 32 percent year-over-year increase that significantly outpaced analyst expectations. Net income more than doubled. Guidance Raised: Management raised full-year earnings guidance and revenue guidance. Stock Performance: Stock gained over 30 percent during trading bringing year-to-date gains to approximately 38 percent. Results also lifted other software companies. AI as Growth Engine: The cloud monitoring company's revenue crossed 1 billion for the first time driven by new customers at major AI research labs. As AI's expansion has become a tailwind for the business since the data-intensive demands of model training and inference push infrastructure complexity higher. Market Opportunity: Analysts estimate total AI-native revenue at 133 million for the quarter including around 88 million from OpenAI up more than 90 percent year-on-year and 45 million from other AI natives up 240 percent.
